name: Domestic Light & Magic
install: bash -c 'set -e; cd web && npm ci; cd ../backend && go mod download'

terminals.name: Go server
terminals.description: Serves the app on port 8080 after a static export is synced into the embed tree (e.g. web npm run release:sync).

terminals.name: Next.js dev
terminals.description: Next.js dev server on port 3000 with hot reload; proxies API requests to the Go server on 8080.
